samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a 64-bit ripple carry adder with pipelining stages and registers to control data flow and synchronization.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation.</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal indicating the availability of the result.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // Pipeline registers
        reg [63:0] adda_reg;
        reg [63:0] addb_reg;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage1;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage2;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage3;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage4;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage5;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage6;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage7;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage8;
        
        // Control signals
        reg i_en_sync;
        reg o_en;
        
        // Synchronize input enable signal
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                i_en_sync <= 0;
            end else begin
                i_en_sync <= i_en;
            end
        end
        
        // Stage 1: Add first 8 bits of adda and addb
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                sum_stage1 <= 0;
            end else if (i_en_sync) begin
                sum_stage1 <= adda[7:0] + addb[7:0];
            end
        end
        
        // Stage 2: Add next 8 bits of adda and addb
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                sum_stage2 <= 0;
            end else if (i_en_sync) begin
                sum_stage2 <= adda[15:8] + addb[15:8];
            end
        end
        
        // Stage 3: Add next 8 bits of adda and addb
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                sum_stage3 <= 0;
            end else if (i_en_sync) begin
                sum_stage3 <= adda[23:16] + addb[23:16];
            end
        end
        
        // Stage 4: Add next 8 bits of adda and addb
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                sum_stage4 <= 0;
            end else if (i_en_sync) begin
                sum_stage4 <= adda[31:24] + addb[31:24];
            end
        end
        
        // Stage 5: Add next 8 bits of adda and addb
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                sum_stage5 <= 0;
            end else if (i_en_sync) begin
                sum_stage5 <= adda[39:32] + addb[39:32];
            end
        end
        
        // Stage 6: Add next 8 bits of adda and addb
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                sum_stage6 <= 0;
            end else if (i_en_sync) begin
                sum_stage6 <= adda[47:40] + addb[47:40];
            end
        end
        
        // Stage 7: Add next 8 bits of adda and addb
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                sum_stage7 <= 0;
            end else if (i_en_sync) begin
                sum_stage7 <= adda[55:48] + addb[55:48];
            end
        end
        
        // Stage 8: Add last 8 bits of adda and addb
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                sum_stage8 <= 0;
            end else if (i_en_sync) begin
                sum_stage8 <= adda[63:56] + addb[63:56];
            end
        end
        
        // Update output enable signal
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                o_en <= 0;
            end else if (i_en_sync) begin
                o_en <= 1;
            end else begin
                o_en <= 0;
            end
        end
        
        // Assign final result
        assign result = {sum_stage8, sum_stage7, sum_stage6, sum_stage5, sum_stage4, sum_stage3, sum_stage2, sum_stage1};
    </implementation>
</module>
